title: Two-Eight
content:
{{Top|ca|leg|notoc=1}} {{Character |type=Galactic Republic |image= |name=Two-Eight
RC-8028 |homeworld=[[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]]{{DB|organization|clonetroopers|clone troopers}} — Based on corresponding biographical and physical details for all [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] |birth=During or after [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], Kamino''[[Republic Commando: Hard Contact]]'' states that the first units of [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commandos]] deployed in the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] were ten [[Standard year/Legends|years]] old and born on [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]]. Two-Eight's [[Sergeant/Legends|squad leader]], [[Niner Skirata|RC-1309]], was among these [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]], meaning that Two-Eight must have been [[Cloning/Legends|created]] during or after [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]]. Furthermore, ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' places the beginning of the Clone Wars in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] and the creation of the clone [[Army/Legends|army]] in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], meaning that Two-Eight's [[Death/Legends|death]] on Kamino occurred sometime between those [[Standard year/Legends|years]]. |death=By [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], Kamino |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] {{C|[[Cloning/Legends|clone]]}}''[[Republic Commando: Hard Contact]]'' |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns= |donor=[[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] |height=1.83 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=*[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] **[[Niner's squad]] |masters= |apprentices= }} '''Two-Eight''', also identified by the number '''RC-8028''',{{CSWECite|III|84|RC-8028}} was the name of a [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commando]] created on the [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]]''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]'' [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]] at some point during or after [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]]. As a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] of the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]], Two-Eight stood 1.83 meters tall. Two-Eight was trained by ''[[Cuy'val Dar]]'' [[Sergeant/Legends|sergeant]] [[Kal Skirata]] to serve in the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic's]] [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army]]. At some point before the outbreak of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], Two-Eight was [[Death/Legends|decapitated]] in a training exercise with their [[Niner's squad|squad]] on Kamino as a result of their own mishandling of [[Explosive charge/Legends|explosives]] during a rapid entry procedure. Although Two-Eight was quickly replaced with another [[Commando/Legends|commando]], the loss of Two-Eight haunted the [[Squad/Legends|squad's]] sergeant, [[Niner Skirata|Niner]], sometime after Two-Eight's death.''[[Republic Commando: Triple Zero]]'' ==Behind the scenes== Two-Eight was first mentioned in the [[2004]] novel [[Republic Commando: Hard Contact|''Hard Contact'']], the first novel in the ''[[Republic Commando]]'' series written by [[Karen Traviss]]. In the [[2008]] reference book ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'', the trooper was given the full designation of RC-8028. ==Appearances== *''[[Republic Commando: Hard Contact]]'' {{1stm}} *''[[Republic Commando: Triple Zero]]'' {{Mo}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' {{1stID|RC-8028}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Clone commandos]] [[Category:Individuals with unspecified pronouns]] [[Category:Males]]
